{"problem_standardized_math":"Program Algorithm 16.3 and use it to solve the quadratic programming problem\n\\[\n\\begin{array}{ll}\n\\min & x_1^2+2x_2^2-2x_1-6x_2-2x_1x_2 \\\\\n\\text{subject to} & \\tfrac{1}{2}x_1+\\tfrac{1}{2}x_2\\le 1,\\qquad -x_1+2x_2\\le 2,\\qquad x_1,x_2\\ge 0.\n\\end{array}\n\\]\nChoose three initial starting points: one in the interior of the feasible region, one at a vertex, and one at a nonvertex point on the boundary of the feasible region."}
